title: MCLN EX15 Returns Receiving Configuration Guide
fullText: EX 15 – Receiving Changes Configuration Guide Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1 Foundational Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45273880 \h 3 1.1 Add EX15 System Code PAGEREF _Toc45273881 \h 3 1.2 Transactional Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45273882 \h 4 1.2.1 Add Returns Receiving transaction PAGEREF _Toc45273883 \h 4 1.2.2 Add Returns LPN Disposition transaction PAGEREF _Toc45273884 \h 12 1.2.3 Add Sort Returns transaction PAGEREF _Toc45273885 \h 15 1.3 RF Menu Maintenance Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45273886 \h 19 1.4 Final Disposition Codes – System Code 714 PAGEREF _Toc45273887 \h 22 1.5 Final Return Disposition UI PAGEREF _Toc45273888 \h 23 1.6 Final Return Disposition Determination UI PAGEREF _Toc45273889 \h 24 1.7 Sorting Zone Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45273890 \h 25 1.8 Miscellaneous Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45273891 \h 27 1.8.1 How to make a location a sorting location? PAGEREF _Toc45273892 \h 27 1.8.2 How to suppress a warning/information message? PAGEREF _Toc45273893 \h 28 Foundational Configuration Add EX15 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX15 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save Transactional Configuration Add Returns Receiving transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for Recv – Mixed Item transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Change the transaction name to Recv – Returns (or any appropriate name) Click Save Click on Program Template on the bottom right hand corner to add a parameter 500-500 used to enable EX15 Click Add Add the following information as pictured below and click Save Select the Recv – Returns transaction and click Edit Navigate to Parameters tab Ensure the parameters are exactly as screenshot below Add Returns LPN Disposition transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for LPN Disposition – Sort transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Fill out the details a s pictured below and click Save Select the transaction record and click Edit Navigate to the Parameters tab and fill out the details exactly as pictured below Add Sort Returns transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for Sort iLPN transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Fill out the details exactly as pictured below and click Save to add a Sort Returns transaction . Transaction name c an named anything based on business needs Click on Program Template on the bottom of the UI Click Add Add parameter 500-500 as pictured below to enable EX15 for the transaction and click Save Select the Sort Returns transaction and click Edit Fill out the information exactly as pictured below RF Menu Maintenance Configuration Navigate to RF Menu Maintenance UI Search for Recv – Returns transaction under Transaction Name Drag the transaction under the receiving folder on the right side of the screen or simple select the Receiving folder on the right side of the screen and click on right arrow to add the transaction to RF Menu Click Save on the bottom of the screen Repeat steps 3 and 4 for transactions LPN Disposition – Return and Sort Returns Right click on Recv – Returns transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF Receiving under available options and click Add Click Save Right click on Sort Returns transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF Sort iLPN under available options and click Add Click Save Right click on LPN Disposition – Return transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF iLPN Disposition under available options and click Add Click Save Final Disposition Codes – System Code 714 Navigate to System Codes UI Search for Code Type 714 Select the Base Code 714 and click on Code IDs Click Add on the bottom of the UI Add the appropriate code IDs and code descriptions for each of the disposition codes. For example: Click Save Final Return Disposition UI Navigate to Final Disposition UI Click Add Add the appropriate information for Final Return Disposition and click Save. For example: Final Return Disposition Determination UI Navigate to Final Return Disposition Determination UI Click Add Fill out the information as applicable and click Save . For example: Sorting Zone Configuration Navigate to Sorting Zone UI Select the sorting zone – Sorting Zone Select the location designated for returns from the available location options and click add Select the appropriate Location Type and click Save. For example: Select the returns sorting location and click Sorting Location on the bottom of the UI Click Add and add an appropriate rule that will capture all the returned items to the sorting location and click Save Miscellaneous Configuration How to make a location a sorting location? Navigate to Reserve Location UI Search for the location that you wish to make a sorting location Select the record and click View on the bottom of the UI Check the Sorting Location flag Click Save How to suppress a warning/information messag e ? Navigate to Messages UI Click on Message Master on the bottom of the UI Search f or the appropriate Message/Message ID and click Apply Select the record and double click on the Message Type section Select Non Display /Log only Click Save

EX 15 – Receiving Changes Configuration Guide Contents  1 Foundational Configuration  1.1 Add EX15 System Code  1.2 Transactional Configuration  1.2.1 Add Returns Receiving transaction  1.2.2 Add Returns LPN Disposition transaction  1.2.3 Add Sort Returns transaction  1.3 RF Menu Maintenance Configuration  1.4 Final Disposition Codes – System Code 714  1.5 Final Return Disposition UI  1.6 Final Return Disposition Determination UI  1.7 Sorting Zone Configuration  1.8 Miscellaneous Configuration  1.8.1 How to make a location a sorting location?  1.8.2 How to suppress a warning/information message?  Foundational Configuration Add EX15 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX15 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save Transactional Configuration Add Returns Receiving transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for Recv – Mixed Item transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Change the transaction name to Recv – Returns (or any appropriate name) Click Save Click on Program Template on the bottom right hand corner to add a parameter 500-500 used to enable EX15 Click Add Add the following information as pictured below and click Save Select the Recv – Returns transaction and click Edit Navigate to Parameters tab Ensure the parameters are exactly as screenshot below Add Returns LPN Disposition transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for LPN Disposition – Sort transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Fill out the details a s pictured below and click Save Select the transaction record and click Edit Navigate to the Parameters tab and fill out the details exactly as pictured below Add Sort Returns transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for Sort iLPN transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Fill out the details exactly as pictured below and click Save to add a Sort Returns transaction .

[Document: MCLN EX15 Returns Receiving Configuration Guide]

to the Parameters tab and fill out the details exactly as pictured below Add Sort Returns transaction Navigate to Transactions UI Search for Sort iLPN transaction and select the transaction Click Copy Fill out the details exactly as pictured below and click Save to add a Sort Returns transaction .

Transaction name c an named anything based on business needs Click on Program Template on the bottom of the UI Click Add Add parameter 500-500 as pictured below to enable EX15 for the transaction and click Save Select the Sort Returns transaction and click Edit Fill out the information exactly as pictured below RF Menu Maintenance Configuration Navigate to RF Menu Maintenance UI Search for Recv – Returns transaction under Transaction Name Drag the transaction under the receiving folder on the right side of the screen or simple select the Receiving folder on the right side of the screen and click on right arrow to add the transaction to RF Menu Click Save on the bottom of the screen Repeat steps 3 and 4 for transactions LPN Disposition – Return and Sort Returns Right click on Recv – Returns transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF Receiving under available options and click Add Click Save Right click on Sort Returns transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF Sort iLPN under available options and click Add Click Save Right click on LPN Disposition – Return transaction and select Assign Permissions Select RF Inbound Module and click search Search for RF iLPN Disposition under available options and click Add Click Save Final Disposition Codes – System Code 714 Navigate to System Codes UI Search for Code Type 714 Select the Base Code 714 and click on Code IDs Click Add on the bottom of the UI Add the appropriate code IDs and code descriptions for each of the disposition codes. For example: Click Save Final Return Disposition UI Navigate to Final Disposition UI Click Add Add the appropriate information for Final Return Disposition and click Save. For example: Final Return Disposition Determination UI Navigate to Final Return Disposition Determination UI Click Add Fill out the information as applicable and click Save . For example: Sorting Zone Configuration Navigate to Sorting Zone UI Select the sorting zone – Sorting Zone Select the location designated for returns from the available location options and click add Select the appropriate Location Type and click Save. For example: Select the returns sorting location and click Sorting Location on the bottom of the UI Click Add and add an appropriate rule that will capture all the returned items to the sorting location and click Save Miscellaneous Configuration How to make a location a sorting location?
